market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Arcturus could halve the grid’s electrical losses using its nano-infused copper
articles.description: Stealthy startup Arcturus uses lasers to infuse carbon nanomaterials into copper, dramatically improving its ability to conduct electricity.

articles.title: Podcasting platform Riverside enters the newsletter publishing game
articles.description: Users will be able use AI to create newsletters based on their recordings.

articles.title: Amazon launches new $1 billion FDE org, following OpenAI and Anthropic
articles.description: Engineers on the new team will embed within companies to deploy purpose-built agents, focusing on fast deployments and customer self-sufficiency.

articles.title: Jefferies warns of crypto market volatility as Clarity Act faces Senate test
articles.description: The bank said the bill faces major hurdles, with passage boosting institutional crypto adoption and delays prolonging regulatory uncertainty.

articles.title: Circle slides 13% as Stripe, Coinbase and BlackRock back rival stablecoin network
articles.description: Open Standard's Open USD aims to let partners keep reserve income and eliminate minting fees, challenging Circle's USDC.

articles.title: 密度比棉花糖還低！罕見「超蓬鬆」氣巨行星或揭露形成演化之謎
articles.description: 天文學家新發現兩顆極為罕見的「超蓬鬆」（super-puff）系外行星 TOI-791b 與 TOI-791c […]

articles.title: MetaMask launches Money Account with stablecoin yield and spending in one wallet
articles.description: The launch reflects a broader push to make stablecoins more useful beyond trading and transfers.

articles.title: MetaMask launches stablecoin yield account with card spending
articles.description: MetaMask launches Money Account it says offers up to 4% variable APY on mUSD stablecoin balances and card spending, with DeFi-powered yield via vaults, excluding the UK and EU.

articles.title: Lumo, Proton’s privacy-focused AI chatbot, gets an upgrade
articles.description: Proton's Lumo 2.0 is dropping this week, giving users a broader variety of capabilities.

articles.title: OKX launches AI marketplace for autonomous agent economy
articles.description: OKX launched a beta marketplace for the agentic economy, enabling AI agents to autonomously find work and collaborate with other agents.

articles.title: Tokenized securities need competition, not gatekeepers
articles.description: Innovation thrives when investors have choices. For tokenized securities, Washington shouldn't pick winners before the market has a chance to learn what works, argues Patrick McHenry, vice chairman at Ondo Finance and former Chairman of the House Financial Services Committee.

articles.title: Strategy's new plan divides industry observers even as MSTR, STRC climb
articles.description: Strategy’s new Bitcoin capital framework draws Wall Street backing from Benchmark with a $570 per share target even as traders question long-term demand risk.

articles.title: Nasdaq expands distribution of its market data into blockchain infrastructure
articles.description: The exchange operator will offer its TotalView data feed through Pyth's marketplace as financial firms increasingly build applications on blockchain rails.

articles.title: Theo becomes first crypto-native investor in Fidelity tokenized fund
articles.description: The onchain capital markets platform allocated $20 million to Fidelity International's tokenized liquidity fund as tokenized Treasury products continue to attract institutional capital.

articles.title: Swan's Cory Klippsten sees record Bitcoin holder supply revealing early bottom
articles.description: The record Bitcoin supply held by long-term holders may suggest that the crypto market bottom will come early, according to Swan’s Cory Klippsten.

articles.title: StarkWare unveils Starknet quantum roadmap, says industry has no excuse
articles.description: “The crypto industry shouldn’t need wake-up calls from the White House or anyone else,” said StarkWare CEO Eli Ben-Sasson.

articles.title: Spiko links EU regulated T-bill funds to Coinbase stablecoin rails
articles.description: Spiko integrated Coinbase Payments into two EU regulated UCITS Treasury funds, enabling USDC and EURC subscriptions and redemption payments through Base.

articles.title: Bitcoin’s quiet $59,000-$60,000 range is starting to look dangerous
articles.description: The token has traded in a tight band near $59,000 to $60,000 all week. The pattern echoes a calm stretch from 2024, but this one is forming below support in a falling market, and a break could open the way toward $40,000.

articles.title: New York Life's $800 billion asset manager makes tokenization debut with Centrifuge fund
articles.description: The $807 billion asset manager is bringing a high-yield corporate bond strategy onto blockchain with Centrifuge as Wall Street expands beyond tokenized Treasury funds.

articles.title: Bitcoin $4.4 billion supply overhang emerges as institutional demand wilts
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for June 30, 2026
